title: solidago spiraeifolia subsp. pacifica
intro: Solidago spiraeifolia subsp. pacifica, also known as Pacific goldenrod, is a perennial plant species native to the Pacific Northwest region of North America. It is known for its golden yellow flowers and has been used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Pacific goldenrod include reducing inflammation and improving digestion, as well as providing relief from colds and flu due to its expectorant properties. Pacific goldenrod can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil for medicinal use, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its effects.
